ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feedback submission */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the customer */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the customer (e.g., Student, Employed) */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income bracket of the customer */,
  "visit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to the establishment */,
  "enjoy_type" TEXT /* Type of dining experience (e.g., Dine in, Take away) */,
  "time_spent_visit" TEXT /* Time spent during visits */,
  "nearest_place" TEXT /* Distance to the nearest outlet */,
  "membership_card" INTEGER /* Membership card status */,
  "frequently_purchase" TEXT /* Frequently purchased items */,
  "spend_per_visit" TEXT /* Average spend per visit */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of quality of the experience */,
  "price_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of price value */,
  "purchase_decision" INTEGER /* Purchase decision rating */,
  "ambiance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for ambiance */,
  "wifi_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for Wi-Fi quality */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for service quality */,
  "business_meetings" INTEGER /* Business meetings occurrence */,
  "promotions" TEXT /* Promotional channels used */,
  "continue_buying" INTEGER /* Likelihood to continue buying */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit associated with the feedback */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion associated with the feedback */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the feedback */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Additional customer suggestions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the customer */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income bracket of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer is subscribed to marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer visiting */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (Dine in, Take away) */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "nearest_place" TEXT /* Nearest location to the customer's residence */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store visited */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total amount spent during the visit */,
  "order_items" TEXT /* JSON array of items purchased during the visit */,
  "wait_time" TEXT /* Time spent waiting for service */,
  "service_staff_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the staff member who served the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the promotion (e.g., Social Media, Email) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion (e.g., Students, Seniors) */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code for the promotion */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotion has been used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Coffee, Pastries) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "is_seasonal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is seasonal */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* JSON array of allergens present in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount spent on the purchase */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the purchase was made */,
  "order_items" TEXT /* JSON array of items purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wifi_quality" (
  "wifi_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Wi-Fi quality rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value for Wi-Fi quality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "speed_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the Wi-Fi speed test (e.g., Mbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wifi_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_quality" (
  "service_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service quality rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value for service quality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the staff member who provided the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., Barista, Waiter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ambiance_quality" (
  "ambiance_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ambiance rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value for ambiance quality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "noise_level" TEXT /* Noise level in the store (e.g., Quiet, Moderate, Loud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ambiance_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_decisions" (
  "purchase_decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase decision rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value for purchase decision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the purchase decision (e.g., Quality, Price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_decision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
